channel.title: Internal-Tools on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Internal-Tools on Arrans github.io

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: Budibase/budibase
item.description: Low code platform for building business apps and workflows in minutes. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, MongoDB, Rest API, Docker, K8s, and more 🚀

item.title: r3-team/r3
item.description: REI3 - Free and open low code
